query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN beneficiario IS NULL THEN 1 END) as beneficiario_null,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN codigo_glosa IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_codigo_glosa,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor_glosa > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_valor_glosa
FROM recebimentos_excel 
WHERE arquivo_id IN (SELECT id FROM arquivos WHERE nome LIKE '%Demostrativo 12-2025%');
